# NontoxicGoods.com

> A curated collection of evidence-based non-toxic products for home, personal care, and family use. Maintained by Mei Park.

## What This Site Is

NontoxicGoods.com is a curated product directory focused on genuinely non-toxic alternatives for everyday household and personal care products. Every product listed is personally used and vetted. No sponsored placements.

## Categories

- Household cleaners
- Personal care and skincare
- Baby and toddler products (strollers, car seats)
- Kitchen and food storage
- Cookware (PFAS-free non-stick)
- Supplements and wellness
- Clothing and shoes (PFAS-free outdoor gear, daily wear)
- Home (mattresses, carpets, furniture)
- Beauty and cosmetics
- Medical supplies
- Bags and accessories

## Data Source

Product data includes items sourced from PFAS Central (pfascentral.org), a project of the Green Science Policy Institute, which maintains a verified list of PFAS-free products across many categories.

## Who Maintains This

Mei Park — indie builder, former engineering director, stay-at-home mom focused on creating healthier home environments. Also runs:

- [The Undercurrent](https://www.theundercurrent.dev): Newsletter on dev tools and AI for builders.
- [Raising Pixels](https://www.raisingpixels.dev): Newsletter on computational thinking and raising tech-native kids.
- [meimakes.com](https://meimakes.com): Main site with open source tools and projects.

## Contact

For product suggestions or corrections: visit the site and use the contact method provided.
